title: Anthropic Accuses Alibaba of Massive AI Technology Theft
subtitle: The US-based AI company claims its rival used millions of fake interactions to copy its most advanced technology.

summary.en: US AI firm Anthropic has accused Chinese technology giant Alibaba of stealing its Claude model's capabilities. Anthropic claims that operators linked to Alibaba used nearly 25,000 fake accounts to perform millions of exchanges. This method, known as a distillation attack, allows companies to train their own AI models using the work of others. Anthropic has asked the US Congress to take action against such activities to protect American research. Alibaba has previously denied similar allegations regarding its ties to the Chinese military.
summary.zh: 美國人工智慧公司 Anthropic 指控中國科技巨頭阿里巴巴竊取其 Claude 模型的能力。Anthropic 聲稱與阿里巴巴有關的營運者使用了近 2 萬 5 千個假帳號進行了數百萬次的交流。這種稱為「蒸餾攻擊」的方法，讓企業能利用他人的成果來訓練自己的人工智慧模型。Anthropic 已要求美國國會針對此類活動採取行動，以保護美國的研究成果。阿里巴巴先前已否認過關於其與中國軍方有關聯的類似指控。

paragraphs.en: The US-based artificial intelligence company Anthropic has made a serious accusation against its Chinese rival, Alibaba. In a letter sent to US Senators Tim Scott and Elizabeth Warren, Anthropic claimed that Alibaba carried out what it described as the largest campaign of its kind to steal the capabilities of its Claude AI model. This development follows a series of similar accusations regarding how Chinese firms are working to match the performance of American AI technology.
paragraphs.zh: 總部位於美國的人工智慧公司 Anthropic 對其中國競爭對手阿里巴巴（Alibaba）提出了嚴厲指控。在致美國參議員史考特（Tim Scott）與華倫（Elizabeth Warren）的一封信中，Anthropic 聲稱阿里巴巴執行了該公司所稱的史上最大規模竊取其 Claude 人工智慧模型能力的行動。在此之前，已有一系列關於中國企業如何試圖追趕美國人工智慧技術表現的類似指控。

paragraphs.en: According to the letter, which was dated June 10, operators linked to Alibaba and its AI lab, Alibaba Qwen, allegedly used nearly 25,000 fraudulent accounts to interact with Claude. Between April 22 and June 5, these accounts performed more than 28.8 million exchanges with the model. Anthropic stated that these actions were a clear violation of its terms of service and access rules, which are meant to prevent such unauthorized use.
paragraphs.zh: 根據這封日期為 6 月 10 日的信件，與阿里巴巴及其人工智慧實驗室「阿里通義千問」（Alibaba Qwen）有關的營運者，涉嫌使用近 2 萬 5 千個詐騙帳號與 Claude 進行互動。在 4 月 22 日至 6 月 5 日期間，這些帳號與該模型進行了超過 2,880 萬次的交流。Anthropic 表示，這些行為明顯違反了其服務條款與存取規則，而這些規則旨在防止此類未經授權的使用。

paragraphs.en: Anthropic explained that the attackers used a technique called a "distillation attack." In this process, a weaker AI model is trained by using the answers and data provided by a stronger, more advanced model. By doing this, companies can copy the intelligence of a high-level model without spending the massive amounts of money and time required for original research and development. Anthropic noted that the attackers specifically targeted Claude’s most valuable skills, including its ability to complete complex tasks, perform software engineering, and engage in advanced decision-making.
paragraphs.zh: Anthropic 解釋說，攻擊者使用了一種稱為「蒸餾攻擊」的技術。在此過程中，透過使用更強大、更先進模型所提供的答案與數據，來訓練一個較弱的人工智慧模型。藉由這種方式，企業無需花費原創研發所需的大量資金與時間，即可複製高階模型的智慧。Anthropic 指出，攻擊者特別鎖定了 Claude 最具價值的技能，包括其完成複雜任務、執行軟體工程以及進行高階決策的能力。

paragraphs.en: To avoid being caught, the operators allegedly used complex methods to hide their identity, including "proxy networks"—systems that route internet traffic through different locations to mask the true source. Anthropic warned that these tactics are becoming more common, creating what it called a "circumvention economy" where groups help each other bypass security measures to steal AI technology. The company argued that these attacks turn billions of dollars of American investment into a "massive subsidy" for its geopolitical competitors, effectively letting them use US research for free.
paragraphs.zh: 為了避免被發現，這些營運者涉嫌使用複雜的方法來隱藏身分，包括「代理網路」——即透過不同地點傳輸網路流量以掩蓋真實來源的系統。Anthropic 警告說，這些策略正變得越來越普遍，形成了一種該公司所謂的「規避經濟」，即各個組織互相協助繞過安全措施以竊取人工智慧技術。該公司主張，這些攻擊將數十億美元的美國投資轉化為對其地緣政治競爭對手的「巨額補貼」，實際上讓他們能免費使用美國的研究成果。

paragraphs.en: This is not the first time Anthropic has raised concerns about such activities. Earlier this year, the company accused other Chinese firms, including DeepSeek, Moonshot, and MiniMax, of using similar tactics to extract data from its models. Other major US tech companies, such as OpenAI and Google, have also reported that their AI models have been targeted by similar efforts. Anthropic stated that these actions are being carried out on an "industrial scale" to help Chinese companies repackage American technology as their own.
paragraphs.zh: 這並非 Anthropic 首次對此類活動表示擔憂。今年稍早，該公司曾指控包括深度求索（DeepSeek）、月之暗面（Moonshot）與 MiniMax 在內的其他中國企業，使用類似策略從其模型中提取數據。其他美國大型科技公司，如 OpenAI 與 Google，也曾報告其人工智慧模型遭到類似手段的鎖定。Anthropic 表示，這些行為正以「工業規模」進行，旨在協助中國企業將美國技術重新包裝為己有。

paragraphs.en: Beyond the issue of AI theft, the situation is complicated by broader tensions between the two nations. Anthropic’s letter pointed to claims from the US Department of Defense that suggest Alibaba and other major Chinese firms have ties to the Chinese military. These claims have been a point of significant conflict. In response to being placed on a US government blacklist, Alibaba has taken legal action, suing the government in an attempt to have its name removed from the list. The companies involved in these allegations have generally denied any wrongdoing or connections to military activities.
paragraphs.zh: 除了人工智慧竊取問題外，兩國之間更廣泛的緊張局勢也使情況變得複雜。Anthropic 的信件指出了美國國防部的說法，暗示阿里巴巴與其他中國大型企業與中國軍方有關聯。這些說法一直是重大衝突的焦點。為了回應被列入美國政府的黑名單，阿里巴巴已採取法律行動，控告美國政府，試圖將其名稱從名單中移除。涉案企業通常否認有任何不當行為或與軍事活動有關聯。

paragraphs.en: Anthropic is currently preparing for a major stock market debut, which is expected to make it one of the most valuable companies in the world. As it grows, the company is urging the US Congress to take stronger action to penalize companies that engage in these attacks. Anthropic believes that without stricter measures, American AI companies will continue to face threats to their intellectual property. The company emphasized that protecting these technologies is a matter of national security, especially as the competition to develop the most powerful AI models intensifies globally.
paragraphs.zh: Anthropic 目前正準備進行大規模的股票上市，預計將使其成為全球最有價值的公司之一。隨著公司成長，它正敦促美國國會採取更強有力的行動，懲罰參與這些攻擊的企業。Anthropic 認為，若沒有更嚴格的措施，美國人工智慧公司將持續面臨智慧財產權受威脅的風險。該公司強調，保護這些技術是國家安全問題，尤其是在全球開發最強大人工智慧模型的競爭日益激烈之際。

paragraphs.en: As of now, the situation remains a point of high tension in the tech industry. While Anthropic continues to provide evidence of these "distillation attacks," the debate over how to protect AI research from being copied by foreign competitors is likely to continue in the halls of the US government. For now, both the tech companies and policymakers are watching closely to see how these accusations will impact future regulations and the ongoing race for AI dominance.
paragraphs.zh: 截至目前，此情況仍是科技產業高度緊張的焦點。儘管 Anthropic 持續提供這些「蒸餾攻擊」的證據，但關於如何保護人工智慧研究免受外國競爭對手複製的辯論，很可能會在美國政府內部持續進行。目前，科技公司與政策制定者都在密切關注這些指控將如何影響未來的法規，以及持續進行中的人工智慧主導權之爭。

keyTerms.definitionEn: To be equal to or as good as someone or something else.
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見作名詞（比賽）或動詞（配對），這裡指能力相當。文中：This development follows a series of similar accusations regarding how Chinese firms are working to match the performance of American AI technology.

keyTerms.definitionEn: Financial support given to help a process or business, often used here ironically to mean getting something for free that others paid for.
keyTerms.noteZh: 此處用引號表示反諷，指競爭對手免費獲取美國的研發成果。文中：The company argued that these attacks turn billions of dollars of American investment into a "massive subsidy" for its geopolitical competitors, effectively letting them use US research for free.

keyTerms.definitionEn: The first public appearance of something, such as a company's stock on the market.
keyTerms.noteZh: 常指藝人首次演出，這裡指公司首次公開募股（IPO）。文中：Anthropic is currently preparing for a major stock market debut, which is expected to make it one of the most valuable companies in the world.

sources.name: BBC News
sources.title: Anthropic accuses Chinese rival Alibaba of illicitly extracting AI capabilities

sources.name: Ars Technica
sources.title: Anthropic says Alibaba must be punished for largest Claude cloning attack

previousArticles.title: Anthropic Accuses Alibaba of Large-Scale AI Theft
previousArticles.summaryEn: US-based AI company Anthropic has accused Chinese firm Alibaba of stealing technology from its Claude model. Anthropic claims Alibaba used thousands of fake accounts to perform millions of exchanges to train its own AI. This process, known as a distillation attack, allows companies to copy expensive technology at a low cost. Anthropic has asked the US Congress to take action against such practices. Alibaba has not yet commented on these specific accusations.

quiz.question: What specific method did Anthropic claim was used to extract information from its Claude AI model?

options.A: Directly hacking into the company's central servers to steal source code.
options.B: Using a weaker model to learn from the responses of a stronger model.
options.C: Deploying malware to track the keystrokes of Anthropic's software engineers.
options.D: Buying access to the model through official corporate partnerships.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 B。根據文章第三段，Anthropic 指出攻擊者使用「蒸餾攻擊」(distillation attack)，即利用較弱的 AI 模型透過向較強的模型提問並學習其回答來複製其能力。選項 A 錯誤，因為文章未提及駭入伺服器；選項 C 的惡意軟體與文章內容不符；選項 D 錯誤，因為這是未經授權的行為，而非官方合作。

quiz.question: Based on the article, why does Anthropic describe these attacks as a 'massive subsidy' for its competitors?

options.A: Because the Chinese government is paying Anthropic directly for the use of its technology.
options.B: Because Alibaba is paying a subscription fee to use Claude for its own research.
options.C: Because the attackers avoid the high costs of R&D by stealing the results of American investments.
options.D: Because Anthropic is receiving tax breaks from the US government for reporting these incidents.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 C。文章第四段提到，這些攻擊讓對手能以「免費」方式使用美國的研究成果，省去了原本研發 AI 所需的巨額時間與金錢成本，因此 Anthropic 將其比喻為一種「巨額補貼」。選項 A、B 與 D 皆與文章脈絡不符，特別是這些行為並非合法交易或政府補貼，而是透過竊取手段達成的經濟優勢。

quiz.question: In the context of the fourth paragraph, what does the word 'circumvention' mean?

options.A: The act of finding a way around a rule or security barrier.
options.B: The process of improving the efficiency of a computer network.
options.C: The legal procedure for filing a lawsuit against a foreign company.
options.D: The act of publicly announcing a new technological discovery.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 A。文中提到「circumvention economy」是指一群人互相幫助以繞過安全措施來竊取技術。Circumvent 的字根包含「繞過」之意，在此處指規避安全防護。選項 B 與技術優化無關；選項 C 與法律訴訟無關；選項 D 與公開發表無關，皆非此詞在文中的正確含義。

quiz.question: What is the primary message of the article?

options.A: Alibaba is the only company currently challenging the dominance of US AI firms.
options.B: Anthropic is seeking to improve its relationship with Chinese tech companies through dialogue.
options.C: The US government has successfully stopped all attempts by foreign firms to copy AI technology.
options.D: Anthropic is raising alarms about AI intellectual property theft, framing it as a national security concern.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 D。本文主要報導 Anthropic 指控中國企業竊取 AI 技術，並強調這不僅是商業糾紛，更涉及國家安全與智慧財產權保護，呼籲美國國會採取行動。選項 A 錯誤，因為文中提到還有其他公司；選項 B 與事實相反，雙方正處於對立面；選項 C 錯誤，因為政府尚未解決此問題，威脅依然存在。
